training_status: resistance training 3x per week with personal trainer

benefits.description: feels full quicker but no noticeable appetite suppression or reduction of food noise
gained a little muscle in arms with training

protocol_notes: OP ordered Semaglutide from Mochi but after 6 weeks without shipping, switched to Tirzepatide from another company. Semaglutide arrived 3 months after order was cancelled. OP is in 1200-1300 calorie per day deficit (doctor recommended 1400), tracking with MyFitnessPal. Trainer conducts body scans every few weeks. Almost 2 months on Tirzepatide with minimal weight loss despite calorie deficit and resistance training. Considering adding Semaglutide to stack for added weight loss benefits.
